info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure AI Health Insights
info.description: Azure AI Health Insights provides an API that serves insight models, specific for Health & Life Sciences, that perform analysis and provide inferences to be used by a human.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Onco Phenotype Job Details

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

request.description: Gets the status and details of the Onco Phenotype job.

response.name: The request has succeeded.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

description.content: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

response.name: An unexpected error response.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

description.content: String error code indicating what went wrong.

description.content: The location for monitoring the operation state.

The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

response.name: An unexpected error response.

header.description: An opaque, globally-unique, client-generated string identifier for the request.
Specifies the date and time at which the request was first created.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.
